user_input: Is HydraCalm suitable for sensitive skin?
retrieved_contexts: SKU SKN-SER-01. NOVA HydraCalm Serum. Category: skincare. Ingredients: hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, ceramide NP, fragrance-free. Sizing / guide: 30ml pump — patch test 24h for sensitive skin. Compatibility: Pairs with SPF in AM; avoid strong retinoids same night for first 2 weeks.
response: Yes — HydraCalm lists niacinamide and is labeled fragrance-free for sensitive skin.
reference: Yes — HydraCalm is suitable for sensitive skin because it contains niacinamide and is fragrance-free.
